description: Fail sandbox boot when required root pnpm install fails during devcontainer entrypoint startup.

userStories.title: Fail fast on required pnpm install errors
userStories.description: As the harness maintainer, I want sandbox boot to stop when the required root dependency install fails so the container cannot appear healthy with missing tooling.
acceptanceCriteria: .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh exits non-zero when the required root pnpm install command fails
SKIP_PNPM_INSTALL=1 remains an explicit opt-out that skips the install without error
Required install behavior is clearly distinguished from optional/best-effort setup in comments or log text
userStories.notes: Implemented and validated in this branch.

userStories.title: Regression-test the fail-fast install branch
userStories.description: As the harness maintainer, I want a lightweight automated check that proves the required pnpm install failure path is not swallowed.
acceptanceCriteria: A test under scripts/__tests__/ asserts entrypoint.sh does not contain a swallowed pnpm install failure branch
The test also asserts SKIP_PNPM_INSTALL=1 remains present
userStories.notes: Implemented and validated in this branch.

userStories.title: Document and validate the boot hardening
userStories.description: As the harness maintainer, I want the change recorded and validated with existing shell/test checks.
acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md records the fix under [Unreleased] and links issue #136
userStories.notes: Implemented and validated in this branch.
